title: MyST Console
description: Settings for the MyST Markdown code runner extension

executableLanguages.title: Executable Languages
executableLanguages.description: Language info-string tags that show a run button in fenced code blocks.

defaultKernelName.title: Default Kernel
defaultKernelName.description: Kernel name to start when creating a new console. Leave empty to prompt the user.

reuseConsole.title: Reuse Console
reuseConsole.description: Reuse an existing console for the same file rather than creating a new one each time.

activateConsole.title: Activate Console on Run
activateConsole.description: Bring the console panel into view when code is executed (without stealing keyboard focus from the editor).
